$comment: Single source of truth for every sound effect in the game. Edit prompts/durations here, then run `npm run gen:sfx` to (re)generate missing files. Use `npm run gen:sfx -- --only <id>` to regenerate a specific sound. ElevenLabs requires duration >= 0.5s, so short hits are generated at 0.5s and may have leading/trailing silence we trim at playback time. Tier-2 bow variants (split3/seeker2/ricochet2/fire2) play the same file as their tier-1 sibling at a lower pitch — see shootSoundFor() in BowSandbox.tsx. Same rule applies to the full-quiver reload, which plays quiver_reload pitched higher. See README.md in this folder for details.

sounds.prompt: short pleasant soft bloom with a warm airy body and a gentle bright shimmer tail, satisfying distinct audible one-shot, not harsh, no instrument

sounds.usedBy: bow=split2 at natural pitch, bow=split3 pitched lower
sounds.prompt: short soft airy whoosh release with a subtle wide spread and gentle breathy motion, pleasant one-shot, not harsh, no instrument, no string, no guitar

sounds.usedBy: bow=seeker at natural pitch, bow=seeker2 pitched lower
sounds.prompt: short soft ember glow release with a gentle warm fizz tail, smooth organic pleasant one-shot, not harsh, no instrument

sounds.usedBy: bow=ricochet1 at natural pitch, bow=ricochet2 pitched lower
sounds.prompt: short punchy springy rebound with a warm bending tail, distinct bouncy one-shot, not harsh, no instrument

sounds.usedBy: bow=fire1 pitched higher (lighter), bow=fire2 at natural pitch (file currently carries the old fire2 take — regen replaces it)
sounds.prompt: warm soft flame whoosh with a gentle crackling glow tail, pleasant organic abstract one-shot, not harsh

sounds.usedBy: quiver=basic — plain arrow hits an enemy
sounds.prompt: firm dry thump impact, distinct and audible with a warm full body, clear present hit
short tonal boom pop with a clear bright crack attack and a warm round low body, distinct punchy concussive one-shot, loud present, not harsh
very short soft airy sigh with a thin smooth body and no attack, subtle pass-through, unobtrusive pleasant one-shot

sounds.usedBy: quiver=blazing|blazing2 — arrow drops fire trail on hit. FILE CURRENTLY CARRIES THE OLD IMPACT_EXPLOSIVE TAKE — regenerating from the prompt below will replace it with a fresh blazing-focused sound.
sounds.prompt: short crackly warm ember-burst impact with brief flame flash, abstract, one-shot

sounds.usedBy: item=ring — fires shockwave when player takes damage
sounds.prompt: short resonant bass pulse expanding outward, sci-fi forcefield release, satisfying thud with airy shimmer, one-shot

sounds.usedBy: item=shield — shield absorbs an incoming hit
sounds.prompt: short glassy shimmer crack, sci-fi shield deflect, crystalline bright, dry one-shot

sounds.usedBy: item=shield — shield has finished regenerating and is back up
sounds.prompt: short warm glassy rising chime, sci-fi shield powering up, reassuring, one-shot
short muted glitchy low distortion hit, abstract player hurt warning, dry, one-shot

sounds.usedBy: any enemy is killed (shared sound for all kinds for now)
sounds.prompt: very short soft puff pop with tiny digital fizzle, abstract creature vanish, dry one-shot

sounds.usedBy: charger finishes its telegraph and lunges at the player
sounds.prompt: aggressive short sci-fi growl surge, menacing low-mid whoosh with a tight attack, enemy lunge telegraph, dry one-shot

sounds.usedBy: player level-up triggers the upgrade-card overlay
sounds.prompt: warm celebratory glow release with a gentle rising shimmer and a satisfying pleasant tail, rewarding mellow magical abstract one-shot, smooth soft attack, not harsh, not aggressive, no instrument

sounds.usedBy: player clicks an upgrade card on level-up
sounds.prompt: very short crisp soft UI click with tiny warm pad tail, satisfying confirm, one-shot

sounds.usedBy: player tries to draw the bow with zero arrows in quiver
sounds.prompt: short hollow dry click like an empty magazine, light metallic tap with a subtle tonal body, slightly abstract no-ammo feedback, distinct one-shot, not harsh

sounds.usedBy: every reloaded arrow — pitch rises from 0.85x (1st arrow) to 1.25x (the arrow that fills the quiver), scaled to whatever capacity is active
sounds.prompt: short mechanical magazine load click with a warm metallic snap and a subtle tonal body, slightly abstract satisfying one-shot, not harsh
